case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. CHUNG LEE

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-21-2014 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF OCT-21-2014 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, CHUNG SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-03-2014
DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
DECLARATION RE VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC
